---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
author: "Author Name"
institute: "Caltech"
date: today
format: caltech-revealjs
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| cache: false
# Remove this chunk if the deck does not use R.
source("_extensions/caltech/caltech-setup.R")
```

## First Slide

Your content here.

## Second Slide

:::{.pull-left}
Left column content.
:::

:::{.pull-right}
Right column content.
:::
